name: Raspberry Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 9x12 inch pan.
3. Melt butter and chocolate in a double boiler over boiling water. Set aside to cool.
4. Beat eggs and sugar until thick and lemon-colored.
5. Add vanilla and raspberry jam, mixing thoroughly.
6. Fold melted chocolate into the egg mixture and mix well.
7. Gently fold sifted flour into the batter, just until blended.
8. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake for 25 minutes or until center is set. Do not overbake. (These are great on their own too!)
